text.message: oh hey portland, been a ahot minute. howe you been?
tbh im out of it rn were we friends or did we did not like each other
i took a break for a season
so the one prior we ran into each other on ranked  a fair bit. id say friends ^^
tbh I wish i played more games in person
and 9 sheep isnt a good block
yall are giving game to oj
if red had a card i obvi go for him
at the expense of the entire table?
its at the expense of one of ur sheep
So looka like black is fine
til yall rob me blind again
not sure why u left red open tho
i wonder if there would be more or less plows face to face
ive had no wheat and a ton of ore the entire game
and im on so much wheat
i was always gettin stolen from there oj
think you and i are out fo it blk
just got robbed 4 times in  2 turns
why move it there when I had 0 cards?
oj im gonna need one of those sheeps here
how do u make a deal with red there?
i gotta take a break from this game
Says that then gonna win this rurn
that doesnt change all the wild plays in this one
or else ur the auto hit
not sure i woulda won without ur help blu
